title: What is a reranker? A plain-English guide to rerank models | reranker.uk
description: What is a reranker? A reranker (rerank model) re-scores retrieved candidates by relevance, usually as a second stage after fast retrieval. Learn how rerankers work, why they boost search and RAG quality, and when to use one.
og_title: What is a reranker? A plain-English guide
og_description: How rerank models re-score retrieved candidates to improve search and RAG quality.
